overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing traversal through a massive industrial trash landfill. The player moves along debris ridges with a vast wasteland of garbage, power towers, and distant city structures visible under a hazy blue sky, eventually approaching and entering a thick smoke cloud with hazard warnings appearing on screen.

agents.ego_description: carefully walking and climbing over metal debris and trash piles along the edge of a massive landfill

entered.detail: large weathered industrial wall with peeling paint and rust patches
scattered piles of household garbage, metal containers, and wooden pallets
futuristic city buildings visible through haze on the horizon
tall electrical pylons with multiple cables stretching across the wasteland

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view navigating along a massive industrial trash landfill. The camera moves past a large rusted metal structure on the right while revealing a panoramic view of the wasteland ahead, with distant city skyscrapers and power transmission towers visible through the haze. The ground is covered entirely in debris, metal scraps, and discarded containers under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated trash ridge overlooking waste valley

events.description: red warning UI bar appears at top of screen indicating hazard zone entry

agents.ego_description: continuing to traverse the trash ridge while approaching a large smoke plume in the distance

entered.detail: thick black smoke rising from the trash piles indicating fire or industrial activity
hazy mountain range forming the backdrop of the wasteland

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends along the trash ridge revealing a vast panoramic view of the garbage valley below. Power transmission towers dominate the middle distance while a concerning black smoke plume becomes visible on the right horizon. At the end of the segment, a red warning UI element appears at the top of the screen as the player approaches the hazardous smoke area.

scene_state.functional_zone: smoke-obscured trash slope with concrete ruins

events.description: entering thick black smoke cloud significantly reducing visibility
passing through dense smoke that obscures the sky and distant view

agents.ego_description: descending into the smoke-filled area while navigating around concrete ruins and metal debris

entered.detail: broken concrete structures and collapsed building fragments embedded in the trash
blue painted metal sheets and containers scattered among the debris

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the player entering a hazardous zone marked by thick black smoke that gradually obscures the sky and reduces visibility. The camera descends through the smoke past concrete ruins and blue metal debris while the warning UI remains visible. The environment transitions from bright daylight to a dark, smoke-filled atmosphere as the player navigates deeper into the trash wasteland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across a sprawling industrial landfill that transitions from a bright, open wasteland into a suffocating cloud of toxic smoke. It begins by navigating past rusted metal structures and discarded containers, revealing a panoramic view of distant skyscrapers and power towers under a bright midday sun. As the camera ascends a ridge of debris, the perspective expands to overlook a vast garbage valley before a dark plume of smoke emerges on the horizon and a red hazard warning appears on the screen. The scene then shifts as the camera descends into the hazardous zone, where thick black smoke gradually swallows the daylight and obscures the sky. Finally, the environment transforms into a dark, low-visibility atmosphere as the camera pushes deeper into the wasteland past concrete ruins and blue metal scraps.
